case_title: MONTANDON PATRICIA VS LOCKE REGINALD et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY MONTANDON PATRICIA AS TO DEFENDANT LOCKE REGINALD STEVENS SHANE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-22-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 01
INVALID SERVICE AS TO REGINALD LOCKE, NO MAILING DONE ON SUBSERVICE.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONTANDON PATRICIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOCKE REGINALD $600.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $600.00, CLAIM AGAINST DEFT SHANE STEVENS NOT HEARD AS SVC OR SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT WAS NOT TIMELY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF JUDGMENT TO STEVENS SHANE RETURNED.
